part3Update: Retirement and republication have since been executed per this plan: TEN_K__4D__INTERMEDIATE v1/v2/v3 retired (ledger-only), v4 published as 0.6.0-pilot's sole bundle with the exact predicted hash. See deterministic-graph-part3-completion.json.
purpose: The same root combination version always resolves the same exact versioned dependencies and produces the same bundle, even after newer artifact versions are later added to the source catalog.
part1ContradictionCheck: No corrected fact from Part 1 was contradicted by the current repository. All four corrected facts were followed exactly.

unexpectedDiscovery.description: CatalogGraphValidator's GRAPH_DUPLICATE_LEVEL_MODIFIER_EXPERIENCE / GRAPH_DUPLICATE_PROGRESSION_MODIFIER_EXPERIENCE checks grouped by Experience across ALL versions of ALL keys, incorrectly flagging two immutable versions of the SAME key as if they were two different, conflicting keys. Never triggered before because no LevelModifierDefinition/ProgressionModifierDefinition key had ever had a second version.
unexpectedDiscovery.fix: Group by distinct Key within each Experience group, not by document/version.
